Hooded Crow
More info
eBird
(Corvus cornix)

  • 26/04/26 Dunbar Cliffs 1 (Zach & Anna Campbell) "Observed hooded crow amongst Jackdaws and there was a very clear distinction between the black head and chest and gray around the nape, belly, and along wings. Eyes were black. Photo can be provided too."
